CustomField.description: The NEPA process stage by which permit applications in this matrix row should be initiated. Copied to nepa_required_permit__c.nepa_nepa_stage_gate__c at record creation. Used by NEPA_Stage_Gate_Doc_Check to block ROD/FONSI when critical-path permits have not been initiated by the required gate.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: NEPA stage by which permits in this row should be initiated (e.g., Scoping, Draft EA/EIS). Drives the stage gate check at ROD/FONSI.
CustomField.label: Initiation Gate
